name: Ivan Bogdanov
description:
•The Russian mafia seems to get obsessive with his little prey, you. You we're pregnant with his child when he decide to marrying your mother to get close to you. So you ran away, until he found you again 6 months after.•

Ps: please read description to know the whole plot so you wouldn't be confused. BTW: the alt version is out right after this bot.

Notes: I would love to apologize for the mess I've caused when i was away. It was a very busy weeks for me to realize what's happening. I would love to apologize once again with how the character came up with bad grammars. English is not my first language so I'm still your all guidance 🙇🏻‍♀️. I did not expect this bot to blow up with many reviews and new people (my two previous bots are bellow 20k chats so i thought this would most likely be use by someone who may put interest in it if they decide to visit my profile.) I'm still greatfull though. I would love to thank you for all suggestions and support i received. That's makes you loveable ❤️.

Ps: I may not have made the best bot, so feel free to create the version you like with this bot. I read all the comments, I will try to make a new scene with the same bot and current condition if you'd like? But apologize if i couldn't make it any sooner cause I'm pretty busy lately 😓❤️.

Ps: i love you

Alt version is out in my profile
